en_source:
Nothing changed.
 Only your position did.
Not luck.
Alignment.
The moment passed.
The record remains.
The sun sank,\nand shadow covered the world once again.
The last grains of sand fell,\nand the story quietly came to a close.
The wind swept through,\nand the footprints vanished without a trace.
The tide came in,\nWhat once had been there returned to the sea.
Victory and defeat \nare nothing more than grains of sand.
The road goes on—or it ends.\nEither way, it lies on the same earth.
The path The path remains.\nOnly your steps stopped.
Your time ran out.\nThe sky didn’t.
The world is still intact.\nYou can return—changed.
The distance was closing.\nTime kept its rhythm.
Your time came to a halt.\nThe sky kept moving.
The path is still here.\nYou can come back—changed.
